title: Cod with Harira and Spices
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired dish featuring cod, harira, and robust spices.
instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and robust spice.
In a separate pan, heat the chopped harira over medium heat.
Add light and moroccan spices to the harira and stir well.
Place the cod fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the cod in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve the cod with the harira-spice sauce spooned over the top.
